# Marcus Ximenes

> Software Developer & Tech Leader passionate about creating innovative solutions and mentoring the next generation of developers.

Marcus Vinicius Ximenes is a Staff Software Engineer currently working at Gupy.

## Contact & Links
- Website: https://marcusvinicius.info
- GitHub: https://github.com/marcusvx
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/marcusvx
- Email: marcus@marcusvinicius.info

## Technical Skills
Kotlin, TypeScript, Java, .NET Core, Node.js, React, Angular, GraphQL, JavaScript, C#, AWS, Docker, DevOps, Microservices, TDD, SOLID

## Experience Highlights
- **Staff Software Engineer at Gupy** (May 2024 - Present)
- **Staff Software Engineer at GRIN** (Dec 2023 - May 2024)
- **Senior Software Engineer at The Luupe** (Apr 2022 - Present)
- **Lead Software Developer/Consultant at ThoughtWorks** (Feb 2019 - Apr 2022)
- **Solutions Architect at Itaú Unibanco** (Nov 2018 - Feb 2019)

## Featured Projects
- **Digital Banking Platform**: Scalable microservices architecture for digital banking solutions, focusing on credit card services and backend systems. (Technologies: Kotlin, Microservices, AWS, Docker)
- **Creator Platform**: Global online platform connecting women and non-binary photographers with brands for diverse content creation. (Technologies: React, TypeScript, Node.js, Cloud)
- **Labor Compliance Platform**: Platform helping businesses monitor employee breaks and prevent violations, with real-time dashboards and mobile apps. (Technologies: .NET Core, WebAPI, Ionic, Node.js)
